name: gitquest
description: GitQuest - interactive Git internals and GitHub activity visualizer

scripts.dev: scripts/with-node22.sh concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: scripts/with-node22.sh npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.render-build: npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
